COBRA Continuation Coverage Election Notice

On behalf of: Advanced Metal Products

¿Hablas español? Instrucciones en la última página

Handle Everything Online

  • As an alternative to the election form provided in this notice, you can now handle your COBRA continuation coverage elections online!
  • No extra charges — online access is completely free!
  • You may get coverage faster — no waiting for snail mail!
  • Setup automatic payments — prevent interruptions in coverage by enrolling in auto pay!
  • Find other options — Anuvi may be able to find you more affordable coverage options!
Get started now at app-staging.anuvi.io using registration code:

G3EXEK

IMPORTANT INFORMATION: COBRA Continuation Coverage and other Health Coverage Alternatives

Date: 04/27/2026

Dear: Ron Swanson and Tammy Swanson

This notice has important information about your right to continue your health care coverage in the Advanced Metal Products Plan (the Plan), as well as other health coverage options that may be available to you, including coverage through the Health Insurance Marketplace at www.HealthCare.gov or by calling 1-800-318-2596. You may be able to get coverage through the Health Insurance Marketplace that costs less than COBRA continuation coverage. Please read the information in this notice very carefully before you make your decision.

Plan Eligibility Table

Plan Name Plan Type
WA Med Plan MEDICAL

How much does COBRA continuation coverage cost?

Plan Name Plan Type Plan Rates (per month)
WA Med Plan MEDICAL Employee Only - $102.00
Employee + Spouse - $122.40
